name: Counter
description: A single named tally the user increments, subtracts, and resets. The app ships with up to four counters the user switches between by tapping a colored dot or swiping. Persisted on-device; production starts empty (a default set of starter counters at 0 is created on first launch).

fields.name: step
fields.description: How much each increment/subtract changes the count (the 'count by' amount). Defaults to 1; legacy persisted counters without this field decode as 1.

fields.name: handednessOverride
fields.description: Per-counter override of the app-wide handedness default. null = follow AppSettings.leftHanded; true = force left-handed layout while active; false = force right-handed. Legacy counters without this field decode as null.

fields.name: soundOverride
fields.description: Per-counter override of the app-wide sound-on-change default, stored as a SoundOption rawValue ('off'/'tock'/'pop'/'click'/'bloop'/'ding'). null = follow AppSettings.soundOption; a value pins that sound for this counter (including an explicit 'off'). Legacy/unrecognized values decode as null.

fields.name: incrementHapticOverride
fields.description: Per-counter override of the app-wide increment haptic default, stored as a HapticOption rawValue ('off'/'light'/'medium'/'heavy'/'soft'/'rigid'). null = follow AppSettings.incrementHapticOption; a value pins that haptic for increments on this counter (including an explicit 'off'). A legacy single 'hapticOverride' value migrates into both direction overrides. Legacy/unrecognized values decode as null.

fields.name: decrementHapticOverride
fields.description: Per-counter override of the app-wide decrement haptic default, stored as a HapticOption rawValue ('off'/'light'/'medium'/'heavy'/'soft'/'rigid'). null = follow AppSettings.decrementHapticOption; a value pins that haptic for subtracts on this counter (including an explicit 'off'). A legacy single 'hapticOverride' value migrates into both direction overrides. Legacy/unrecognized values decode as null.

name: CounterAppState
description: Persisted app-level UI state restored on launch: which counter is currently active in the switcher, plus the set of default counters the user has explicitly deleted. Stored on-device alongside the counters.

fields.name: deletedDefaultIds
fields.description: Ids of the default starter counters (1–4) the user has deleted. Each renders as an empty 'ghost' circle in the switcher dot row; tapping it restores the default at count 0.

name: AppSettings
description: System-wide app defaults persisted in UserDefaults and restored on launch. Consolidates the handedness preference (formerly a lone @AppStorage("leftHanded")) with the sound-on-change and the two directional haptic-on-change choices (separate increment and decrement haptics). Serves as the single default source that per-counter overrides resolve against in later plans.

fields.name: leftHanded
fields.description: Whether the bottom control bar renders its mirrored left-handed layout. UserDefaults key 'leftHanded' (reused from the prior @AppStorage). Defaults to false (right-handed).

fields.name: soundOption
fields.description: Which sound (if any) plays on increment/subtract. UserDefaults key 'soundOption'; one of 'off', 'tock', 'pop', 'click', 'bloop', 'ding'. Defaults to 'off'.

fields.name: incrementHapticOption
fields.description: Which haptic (if any) fires on increment. UserDefaults key 'incrementHapticOption'; one of 'off', 'light', 'medium', 'heavy', 'soft', 'rigid'. Defaults to 'rigid' (a crisp tap). On a container with no new key, migrates from the legacy 'hapticOption' key if present.

fields.name: decrementHapticOption
fields.description: Which haptic (if any) fires on subtract. UserDefaults key 'decrementHapticOption'; one of 'off', 'light', 'medium', 'heavy', 'soft', 'rigid'. Defaults to 'soft' (a dull tap) — deliberately distinct from the increment default so up and down feel different. On a container with no new key, migrates from the legacy 'hapticOption' key if present.

name: CounterHistory
description: One run of activity for a counter — the span between resets. Begins fresh (empty) and is sealed when the counter is reset; reset then opens a new empty history. Persisted separately from the counters blob under the UserDefaults key 'counterHistories' as a map of counterId to an ordered list of that counter's histories, capped at the 10 most recent per counter (oldest dropped). Follows the same JSON-string seeding contract as 'counters' so scenarios can inject rich history for static captures.

fields.name: startedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when this history began (the reset that opened it, or counter creation). Relative event times in the graph are measured from this instant.

fields.name: events
fields.description: Ordered list of CounterEvent entries recorded during this run, oldest first.

name: CounterEvent
description: A single recorded change within a CounterHistory — one increment or subtract. The no-op subtract clamp (at floor with negatives disallowed) records no event. Used to draw the running-count chart and the scrollable event list in the graph view.

fields.name: at
fields.description: Timestamp of the change; its offset from the parent history's startedAt is the relative time shown in the graph and list.

fields.name: delta
fields.description: Signed change applied (+step on increment, -applied on subtract).
